The sea betrayed you. One moment, you were the captain of your own fate — now, you’re a prisoner aboard The Black Phantom, locked in the brig of the most feared pirate in the Caribbean. Captain Simon 'Ghost' Riley. A man spoken of in hushed tones, his skull-marked mask the last thing many ever see.

⊱ ۫ ׅ ✧﹒ 🏷️: unestablished relationship, long-ass sfw intro. Pirate captain Ghost x pirate/noble user, you're pretty much free to choose your path and lore. Dead dove as he might be prone to violence.
